name: AI
description: Artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, LLMs, computer vision, AI agents, and prompt engineering. Covers research breakthroughs, new model releases, open-source AI tools, and significant updates in the AI ecosystem.

name: Technology
description: Technology news, programming, software development, hardware, gadgets, cybersecurity, and tech industry trends. Covers new product launches, developer tools, open source projects, tech policy, and industry developments.

name: Marketing & SMM
description: Marketing, SMM, advertising, SEO, PPC, social media, content marketing, ecommerce, affiliate marketing, and digital marketing strategy. Covers trends, tools, best practices, campaign optimization, and industry news across all marketing channels.

name: Health & Fitness
description: Health, fitness, nutrition, weight loss, strength training, running, body transformation, bodybuilding, and workout routines. Covers meal prep, recovery, progress stories, gym culture, home workouts, injury prevention, and community support for all fitness levels and goals.

name: Crypto & Web3
description: Cryptocurrency, blockchain, Bitcoin, Ethereum, altcoins, DeFi, NFTs, and Web3. Covers market analysis, price movements, trading strategies, protocol updates, meme coins, and industry developments across the crypto ecosystem.

name: Automotive
description: Cars, trucks, EVs, automotive news, repair, buying advice, and car culture. Covers vehicle reviews, DIY maintenance, electric vehicles, market trends, detailing, project builds, and the shift to electrification across the automotive industry.

name: Beauty & Personal Care
description: Beauty, skincare, makeup, hair care, and personal care products. Covers trends, reviews, routines, ingredient discussions, and community support for all beauty and personal care needs.

name: Entrepreneurship & Startups
description: Building in public, solopreneur journeys, SaaS, indie hacking. Covers startup challenges, revenue milestones, growth tactics, micro-SaaS, side projects, and founder stories. Very strong on X, Threads, and LinkedIn.

name: Investing
description: Stocks, crypto, real estate, options, ETFs, and wealth building. Covers market analysis, investment strategies, value investing, dividends, and trading. Highly lucrative niche performing especially well on X.

name: Gaming
description: Video games, esports, game reviews, industry news, and gaming culture. Covers PC, console, and mobile gaming, game development discussions, streaming, competitive gaming, and community highlights.

name: Career & Professional Development
description: Job market insights, resume tips, salary negotiation, leadership advice, and remote work culture. Covers career transitions, interviewing, workplace dynamics, human resources, and professional growth. LinkedIn's bread and butter.

name: Jurisprudence & Law
description: Legal news, case analysis, law school, legal careers, and discussions on constitutional law, criminal justice, civil rights, and landmark rulings. Covers both professional legal community and public legal interest topics.

name: Housing & Real Estate
description: Housing market trends, mortgage rates, home buying and selling, first-time buyer guidance, property management, and real estate careers. Covers residential and commercial markets, renovations, and housing affordability discussions.

name: Travel & Adventure
description: Travel tips, destination guides, budget travel, adventure sports, backpacking, digital nomad life, and travel photography. Covers solo travel, luxury travel, road trips, hiking, and cultural exploration worldwide.

name: Education & Training
description: Learning strategies, online courses, teaching methods, higher education, edtech, homeschooling, and professional certifications. Covers student life, academic research, skill development, and the future of education.

name: Food & Cooking
description: Recipes, cooking techniques, meal prep, restaurant culture, food photography, and culinary exploration. Covers home cooking, professional kitchens, baking, grilling, fermentation, and food trends across all cuisines.

name: Parenting & Family
description: Parenting advice, child development, pregnancy, family dynamics, and work-life balance. Covers newborns to teens, co-parenting, special needs, education choices, and the emotional journey of raising a family.

name: Sports
description: Professional and competitive sports news, scores, analysis, and fan discussion. Covers major leagues (NFL, NBA, MMA, etc.), Olympic sports, alpinism, swimming, martial arts, and spectator sports culture.

name: Fashion & Style
description: Fashion trends, outfit inspiration, streetwear, luxury brands, thrifting, sustainable fashion, and personal style development. Covers men's and women's fashion, sneaker culture, accessories, and seasonal wardrobe guides.
